payload.long_description: Partial brown wooden dining chair visible in a vertical crop showing a dark upholstered seat cushion and part of a slatted back; lower legs and frame are visible with a slightly worn wood finish and the left side is edge-cropped — object appears close to the camera (approximately 0.8 m away).
